Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 261 

For those states with multiple reporting entities, all values of SUBMTG_STATE_CD should be used 
(“56” and “93” for Wyoming; “30” and “94” for Montana; “42” and “97” for Pennsylvania).
